title: Odia University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Posts
shortInfo: The latest Odia University Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor posts! Published on 05 May 2026 at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 21 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a Master’s Degree with at least 55% marks, Ph.D. Degree, NET/SET/SLET qualifications, research publications, and teaching/research experience as per UGC Regulations 2018 can apply online from 05 May 2026 to 04 June 2026. Find all details about the Odia University Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor new vacancy 2026, i

basic_details.job_title: Odia University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Odia University Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor posts! Published on 05 May 2026 at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 21 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants possessing a Master’s Degree with at least 55% marks, Ph.D. Degree, NET/SET/SLET qualifications, research publications, and teaching/research experience as per UGC Regulations 2018 can apply online from 05 May 2026 to 04 June 2026. Find all details about the Odia University Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor new vacancy 2026, i

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree with at least 55% marks, Ph.D. Degree, NET/SET/SLET, Research Publications, Teaching/Research Experience as per UGC Regulations 2018
qualification.details: Professor: Ph.D. + minimum 10 years teaching/research experience + 10 publications + research score 120 (as per UGC Regulations 2018) Associate Professor: Ph.D. + Master’s ≥55% + 8 years experience + 7 publications + research score 75 (as per UGC Regulations 2018) Assistant Professor: Master’s ≥55% + NET/SET/SLET or Ph.D. as per UGC 2009/2016 regulations (as per UGC Regulations 2018)

salary_details.pay_scale: Odisha Revised Scales of Pay for University Teachers (UGC Scale of Pay) Rule, 2019 + DA & allowances
salary_details.details: Professor: Academic Level 14 Associate Professor: Academic Level 13A Assistant Professor: Academic Level 10 | All posts will receive salary as per Odisha Revised Scales of Pay for University Teachers (UGC Scale of Pay) Rule, 2019 + DA & allowances.

selection_process: Screening/Shortlisting based on Academic Score and Research Score Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Odia University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Odia University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Odia University recruitment is 04-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Professor/Associate Professor/Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies announced for the Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions at Odia University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Professor post, candidates need a Master’s degree with at least 55% marks and should have cleared NET/SET/SLET or possess a Ph.D. as per UGC regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General category candidates is ₹ 1,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening/shortlisting based on academic and research scores, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The Professor post is offered at Academic Level 14, along with DA and allowances as per Odisha Revised Scales of Pay.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Odia University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official Odia University website or the direct link provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the Advt No for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Advertisement Number for this recruitment is 01 of 2026/27.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
